repair_summary: Replaced generic hardcoded Hyperliquid fetch API with five parameterized read-only methods; added Ethereum address/coin/time-range validation; separated SDK vs raw HTTP provenance reporting; embedded AdapterHealth in every AdapterResult; added CCXT bounded timeout/kwargs/normalized dicts; separated HTTPX connect/read/write/pool timeouts.
forbidden_capability_scan: PASS (verified no wallet/exchange/signing/order imports in adapter code)

clearinghouse_probe.note: Dead address — no real positions expected; tests validation + HTTP path

ccxt_probe.reason: unsupported_capability — CCXT 4.5.59 has dict uses camelCase fetchTicker, adapter checks snake_case fetch_ticker

validation_coverage.ethereum_address_format: tested — valid hex, mixed-case, empty, short, no-prefix, non-string cases
validation_coverage.integer_time_range: tested — valid range, negative start/end, start>end, equal, non-integer

mocked_test_coverage.fetch_clearinghouse_state: valid address + invalid address + SDK fallback tests
mocked_test_coverage.fetch_funding_history: empty coin, negative start, start>end, valid with/without end, SDK fallback

ccxt_improvements.operation_kwargs: kwargs passed to ticker/OI/funding_rate; OHLCV uses positional timeframe/limit
ccxt_improvements.normalized_dicts: ticker, OHLCV, OI, funding rate each normalized to stable adapter-owned dicts
ccxt_improvements.raw_preserved: raw CCXT data preserved as _raw key inside each normalized record

known_limitations: Hyperliquid SDK Info(skip_ws=True) requires websocket dependency — may fail in minimal environments (unchanged from baseline)
CCXT 4.5.59 shadows import when ccxt subpackage exists in project (unchanged from baseline)

CCXT adapter _has_method checks snake_case method name against camelCase CCXT has dict — live Binance ticker probe FAILED (unsupported_capability). Unit tests pass because mock has dict is hand-written. Requires repair in ccxt_public_market_adapter.py.
Only 3 exchanges in allowlist (binance, okx, bybit) (unchanged from baseline)
AdapterHealth uses __post_init__ auto-population — health is present on all AdapterResult instances
clean_status: All 75 unit tests pass (0 failed, 0 skipped). Live probes: Hyperliquid SDK allMids OK (866 assets), meta OK, raw HTTP OK, clearinghouse OK, fundingHistory OK (1 BTC record). CCXT Binance ticker FAILED — camelCase capability mismatch (known baseline bug, out of scope for R02). data_mode=degraded. No wallet/exchange/signing/order imports. No zero-address or BTC hardcoding.
